languages.text: Изимонд особо следит за Ярубом как за самым ненадежным из меровцев. Необходимо предупредить Яруба, чтобы он держался с блюстителем настороже.

traits.locale_text: Изимонд особо следит за Ярубом как за самым ненадежным из меровцев. Необходимо предупредить Яруба, чтобы он держался с блюстителем настороже.

languages.text: Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.
languages.original_text: Изимонд особо следит за Ярубом как за самым ненадежным из меровцев. Необходимо предупредить Яруба, чтобы он держался с блюстителем настороже.

traits.locale_text: Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.
Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.
Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.
Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.

languages.text: Isimond behält Jarub als den vermeintlich unzuverlässigsten Merovianer genau im Auge. Jarub muss gewarnt werden, sich vor dem Enforcer in Acht zu nehmen.
languages.original_text: Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.

traits.locale_text: Isimond behält Jarub als den vermeintlich unzuverlässigsten Merovianer genau im Auge. Jarub muss gewarnt werden, sich vor dem Enforcer in Acht zu nehmen.

languages.text: Isimond surveille Jarub de près, car il est le moins fiable des Meroviens. Il faut dire à Jarub de se méfier du prévôt.
languages.original_text: Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.

traits.locale_text: Isimond surveille Jarub de près, car il est le moins fiable des Meroviens. Il faut dire à Jarub de se méfier du prévôt.

languages.text: 伊西蒙德格外注意雅鲁布，视他为最不可信的梅罗夫人。必须提醒雅鲁布提防那个执法者。
languages.original_text: Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.

traits.locale_text: 伊西蒙德格外注意雅鲁布，视他为最不可信的梅罗夫人。必须提醒雅鲁布提防那个执法者。

languages.text: Isimond no pierde de vista a Jarub, pues lo considera el menos fiable de los merovianos. Es preciso advertir a Jarub de que se mantenga alerta frente al guardia de seguridad.
languages.original_text: Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.

traits.locale_text: Isimond no pierde de vista a Jarub, pues lo considera el menos fiable de los merovianos. Es preciso advertir a Jarub de que se mantenga alerta frente al guardia de seguridad.

languages.text: イシモンドは、メロビア人の中で最も信頼できないヤルブを特別視している。ヤルブは監督から目を離さないよう警告されなければならない。
languages.original_text: Isimond has a special eye on Yarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to keep a wary eye on the overseer.

languages.text: İsimond, en güvenilmez Merovlu olarak Jarub'u özellikle yakından izliyor. Jarub, infazcıya karşı tetikte olması konusunda uyarılmalı.
languages.original_text: Isimond keeps a particularly close watch on Jarub as the most unreliable of the Merovians. Jarub must be warned to remain on his guard against the enforcer.

traits.locale_text: İsimond, en güvenilmez Merovlu olarak Jarub'u özellikle yakından izliyor. Jarub, infazcıya karşı tetikte olması konusunda uyarılmalı.
